research_novelty: The restricted physical detector gate bound is derived from a cardinality-scaled local budget partition certificate rather than assumed directly as gate_bound.
harder_obstruction_removed: The certificate removes the circular aggregate gate-bound assumption and replaces it with a checkable finite per-detector budget partition condition.
does_not_prove: existence of a partitioned budget certificate for arbitrary physical detector fields
derivation of partitioned budget certificates from continuum GR data
arbitrary physical detector fields are admissible
physical detector-field extraction for continuum GR data
